ham.subject: Workshop on Data Analytics – RSVP by Monday
ham.body:
Dear Professor Sharma,

We are pleased to host the annual Data Analytics Workshop on 15th March at the main auditorium. Please confirm your attendance and any dietary requirements by Monday, 12th March.

Thank you for your participation.

Best regards,
S. Patel
Academic Programs Coordinator
University of Riverside

spam.subject: You’ve Been Shortlisted for a $5,000 Scholarship – Act Now!
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! The Global Education Fund has identified you as a top candidate for a $5,000 scholarship award to support your studies. To claim the grant, you must provide your bank account details and a photocopy of your ID before 24 hours.

Click <URL> to submit the required documents and secure your prize. Failure to act in time may result in forfeiture of the award.

Regards,
Global Education Fund Team
